data.title: 2200-nen Neko no Kuni Nippon
data.synopsis:
Takes place in the year 2200, where Japan has become a land of cats as the human population's birth rate has declined. In this future world, cats can talk, learn, and work. The story follows a high school girl and her argumentative cat.

(Source: ANN)

data.title: Shi Wai (2025)
data.synopsis:
After death, before reincarnation, the souls of the deceased transit through a fantastical realm known as, Another World. Gudo is a spirit that helps to guide these transient souls to their reincarnation. While guiding a young girl named Yuri, he learns that humans have emotions that he does not understand. Tasked by Goddess Mira to help Yuri control her rage and prevent her transformation into a monster, Gudo embarks on a perilous mission.

(Source: letterboxd.com)

data.title: Yongzhe Donghua Xilie 2
data.synopsis:
In a fantasy world where humans and demons are long-time enemies, humans choose "Braves" as symbols of justice, while "Demons" are branded as evil.
But when the ancient demon god awakens, the war begins to blur the lines between right and wrong. Power, oppression, and prejudice begin to unravel, forcing every character to question:
What is justice? Who decides what is evil?
This isn't just a fantasy adventure—
It's a battle of beliefs, freedom, and breaking the labels that define us.

(Source: YouTube)

titles.title: Chiisana Jam to Goblin no Opp
小さなジャムとゴブリンのオップ

data.title: Chiisana Jam to Goblin no Opp
data.title_japanese: 小さなジャムとゴブリンのオップ
data.synopsis: Animated short film based on a picture book by Yoshiji Kigami. It follows the growth of Jam, an apprentice wizard, through his interactions with Opp, a cynical goblin.

data.title: Fuun kara no Saikyou Otoko
data.synopsis:
"Fortune and Misfortune are two sides of the same coin?! Reverse any adversary and cease redemption!!" Siegbert is reborn after an unfortunate accident in his previous life. His new family is warm and welcoming... so much so it seems as though he may no longer be an unlucky person. In this world, he can finally live a quiet, peaceful life... or so he thought. It seems that he actually holds an insanely high luck stat in this new world...? "Every chance is a manifestation of good fortune. If you can cease the chances, your wishes shall be granted..." Conquering each "chance" granted by his good fortune, will he now cease redemption on the generational legacy this family has yet to fulfill?!

(Source: Starts Shuppan)

titles.title: Sylvanian Families: Freya no Wonder Days
シルバニアファミリー フレアのワンダーデイズ

怪獣デコード アイダラの指輪

data.title_japanese: 怪獣デコード アイダラの指輪
title_synonyms: Kaiju Decode: The Ring of Aidara
data.synopsis:
Set in Sakai, a youth named Maru lives in the peaceful city, a society freed from the restrictions of the body, mind, space, and time. In contrast, a girl named Coco, a member of the Aidara Tribe, resides in the Zone, a treacherous area also inhabited by incredible beasts. The story revolves around two opposing characters seeking a path into a shared future.

(Source: Sakai Film Office, edited)

data.title: Liushui Cao
data.synopsis:
Based on the traditional Chinese musical composition Liushui Cao. Through the story of a shepherd's dream of pursuing a kite, it depicts the natural world of ink-and-wash painting, depicting flowing mountains, rapids, and a calm lake under the autumn moon.

(Source: Douban, translated)

titles.title: [Watashi no Ofuru de Waruin dakedo] to Okaasama (Heroine) ni Torimaki wo Oshitsukerare, Totsuida Henkyou demo Yome Atsukai Saremasen ga, Okage de Jiyuu ni Ikiraremasu!
【私のおふるで悪いんだけど】とお母様(ヒロイン)に取り巻きを押し付けられ、嫁いだ辺境でも嫁扱いされませんが、おかげで自由に生きれます！

data.title: [Watashi no Ofuru de Waruin dakedo] to Okaasama (Heroine) ni Torimaki wo Oshitsukerare, Totsuida Henkyou demo Yome Atsukai Saremasen ga, Okage de Jiyuu ni Ikiraremasu!
data.title_japanese: 【私のおふるで悪いんだけど】とお母様(ヒロイン)に取り巻きを押し付けられ、嫁いだ辺境でも嫁扱いされませんが、おかげで自由に生きれます！
data.synopsis:
After being handed one of her mother's attendants as a fiancé and effectively kicked out of the royal palace, a young noblewoman begins an uneasy new life in her husband's household. The atmosphere is anything but welcoming, though her expressionless husband seems surprisingly kind. With her beloved dolls as companions, she settles into her new home, only to find herself with far too much free time. This is the start of a lighthearted marriage story about unexpected bonds, quiet days, and the dolls who make them a little less lonely.

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: #Kanagawa ni Sunderu Elf
data.synopsis:
2 years ago, the elves who lived in the hidden forest lost their homes due to a forest fire, now they are living in the Kanagawa Prefecture.

This story however focuses on a human who becomes the roommate of an elf living in an apartment.

(Source: MU)

titles.title: Chou Futsuu Mahou Shoujo Asumi Toruverse
超普通マホウ少女アスミトルバース

data.title: Chou Futsuu Mahou Shoujo Asumi Toruverse
data.title_japanese: 超普通マホウ少女アスミトルバース
data.synopsis:
Mito Hamajoh, a second-year middle school student living in Chiba City, has always struggled with being "normal." Then, just before summer vacation, a mysterious transfer student, Asumi Chishiro, who dares to say, "I'm not interested in normal things," arrives.

(Source: X, translated)

data.title: Uso Tantei Tomanto
data.synopsis:
The "authentic mystery" story follows Tomanto and friends as they solve mysteries using vegetable and fruit trivia.

(Source: ANN)

data.title: #Zombie Sagashitemasu
data.synopsis:
Set in a world where 90% of humanity has contracted and died from a deadly, virulent disease, only to rise again as attacking zombies, thirteen years have passed since the "Red Day" of societal collapse. The surviving humans now live away from the big cities, still hoping to reclaim them one day. An entirely new generation, unaware of the pre-Red Day world, is coming into its own.

The story begins when Aki, who has no memories of the world before its fall, escapes her village with her close friends Haru and Natsuki to search for her missing father. As they venture into the outside world, they find themselves surrounded by zombies on all sides! Along the way, they rescue Yuu and Sakura and take refuge in a home improvement store. They regroup, and now the counterattack begins—!!

(Source: Kadokawa, edited)
data.background: #Zombie Sagashitemasu aired on TV Asahi's IMAnimation block.

titles.title: Qiyun Dantian: Kaiju Qiandao Zhizun Dantian
Reborn to be a Supreme Emperor
Sign-in at the Start: Supreme Dantian
启运丹田：开局签到至尊丹田

data.title: Qiyun Dantian: Kaiju Qiandao Zhizun Dantian
data.title_japanese: 启运丹田：开局签到至尊丹田
title_synonyms: Reborn to be a Supreme Emperor
Sign-in at the Start: Supreme Dantian
data.synopsis:
Qin Shu, son of the Divine King, was born with a mortal body and destiny. He was spurned by the celestial realm and threatened with being stripped of his status as a Divine Son and banished to the mortal realm. Until he met the protagonist and became one with her, unlocking the Myriad Realms sign-in system and opening his perpetual elixir field at Chaos Heaven's Absolute Cloud Peak. He then rose from the lowest echelons of the Shinto realm, battling Asuras, ghosts, and the Martial Emperor. Single-handedly, he slew all the gods and Buddhas, ascending to the summit of the Nine-Nine Eighty-One Heavens. Even the gods could not stand in his way, and with his mortal body, he ascended to the pinnacle of Shinto. Finally, he emerged victorious from the life-and-death duels among the Sons of God, single-handedly confronting the nine sons of the Emperors, foiling Hunyuan Tianzun's terrifying plot to seize the Shinto realm and becoming the new Great Emperor.

(Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

data.synopsis: Music video for the song Rendezvous by mekakushe.
